_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces for the default JOURNEY archetype at the trust>=0.50 gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why. History: adding the science subgraph shifted Roman Empire's top from Qin Shi Huang to Mithra. The Hellenistic-India-Buddhism bridge (ADR 0011: added India, Buddhism, Alexander the Great, Alexandria + short cross-cultural links) then connected the formerly-isolated science/India cluster into the Rome-Silk Road-China web, so the longest *meaningful* journeys now span Eurasia: Roman Empire -> Buddhism (via Silk Road -> Persia -> Alexander -> India), Christianity -> Rigveda, and a now-un-isolated Euclid -> Persia. Winners lead their runners-up by >=1.3 wow, so they are stable.
